variables.input:
fetch dt.entity.host
| fields entity.name
| filterOut isNull(entity.name)
| sort entity.name asc
| summarize distinctHostNames = collectDistinct(entity.name)

21.title: High Traffic Average
21.description: Observed Traffic metric for high traffic patterns. This value is used to train the forecasting model.
21.query:
data record("a", 1)
| fields `High Traffic Average` = toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[2])

87.description: Disk Free current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns.

89.title: % Change (High)
89.description: Forecasted metric for Disk Free Change (High) based on the simulated traffic change.
89.query:
timeseries {
  diskUsage = avg(dt.host.disk.free),
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }

},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.Median = arrayAvg(diskUsage)
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskUsage[] < diskUsage.Median, diskUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskUsage[] > diskUsage.Median, diskUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.PercentChange = 100 * (diskUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian - diskUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (diskUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficDisk = diskUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(diskUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficDisk = arrayMax(array(0, ForecastedHighTrafficDisk))
| fields memPercentChange = 100 * (ForecastedHighTrafficDisk - diskUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian)/diskUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian

91.title: Disk  Free Avg
91.description: Forecasted metric for Disk Free Average based on the simulated traffic change.
91.query:
timeseries {
  diskUsage = avg(dt.host.disk.free),
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }

},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.Median = arrayAvg(diskUsage)
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskUsage[] < diskUsage.Median, diskUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskUsage[] > diskUsage.Median, diskUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskUsage.PercentChange = 100 * (diskUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian - diskUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (diskUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgTrafficDisk = diskUsage.Median*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(diskUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fields ForecastedAvgTrafficDisk = arrayMax(array(0, ForecastedAvgTrafficDisk))

143.title: Forecast High
143.description: The forecast high for Disk Free based on the simulated traffic volume.

144.title: Forecast High
144.description: The forecast high for Memory Usage based on the simulated traffic volume.

146.title: CPU Provisioning
146.description: Right size provisioning calculates the CPU capacity needed to support the simulated traffic volume. A positive red value indicates that your infrastructure is over provisioned and CPU capacity can be reduced by the chart value resulting in infrastructure savings.  A negative red value indicates that your infrastructure is under provisioned and CPU capacity will need to be increased by the chart value in order to support traffic volumes. A green value indicates that your CPUs are right sized.
146.query:
timeseries {
  cpuUsage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage),
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }
},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.Median = arrayAvg(cpuUsage)
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(cpuUsage[] < cpuUsage.Median, cpuUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(cpuUsage[] > cpuUsage.Median, cpuUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.PercentChange = 100 * (cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian - cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficCPU = toDouble($ProvisionGoal) - cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(cpuUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)

147.title: Memory Provisioning
147.description: Right size provisioning calculates the Memory capacity needed to support the simulated traffic volume. A positive red value indicates that your infrastructure is over provisioned and Memory capacity can be reduced by the chart value resulting in infrastructure savings.  A negative red value indicates that your infrastructure is under provisioned and Memory capacity will need to be increased by the chart value in order to support traffic volumes. A green value indicates that your Memory is right sized.

148.title: Disk Provisioning
148.description: Right size provisioning calculates the Disk capacity needed to support the simulated traffic volume. A positive red value indicates that your infrastructure is over provisioned and Disk capacity can be reduced by the chart value resulting in infrastructure savings.  A negative red value indicates that your infrastructure is under provisioned and Disk capacity will need to be increased by the chart value in order to support traffic volumes. A green value indicates that your Disks are right sized.

149.title: CPU % Top $TopN Entities (Last 7 Days)
149.description: CPU current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns by host. Click the host link to drill into Infrastructure and Operations for a host. Click the filter link to filter the dashboard for a host. The table time range is fixed for the last 7 days.
149.query:
timeseries {
  cpuUsage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage), 
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }, by:{dt.entity.host}
},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.Median = arrayAvg(cpuUsage)
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(cpuUsage[] < cpuUsage.Median, cpuUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(cpuUsage[] > cpuUsage.Median, cpuUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.PercentChange = 100 * (cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian - cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowTrafficCPU = cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(cpuUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgTrafficCPU = cpuUsage.Median*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(cpuUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficCPU = cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(cpuUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fields `Host Name` = replaceString(concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.host),"](https://",$Tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Default#filtering=%22Host+name%22+%3D+",entityName(dt.entity.host),"+)")," ","%20"), `Observed CPU Low` = cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian, `Observed CPU Avg` = cpuUsage.Median, `Observed CPU High` = cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian, `Forecasted Low CPU` = ForecastedLowTrafficCPU, `Forecasted Avg CPU` = ForecastedAvgTrafficCPU, `Forecasted High CPU` = ForecastedHighTrafficCPU, `Provisioning` = (toDouble($ProvisionGoal) -ForecastedHighTrafficCPU), `Filter Dashboard` =  replaceString(concat("[FilterHost](http://",$Tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/",$DashboardID,"#from=now%28%29-",$DashboardTF,"h&to=now%28%29&tileIds=&vfilter_Host=",entityName(dt.entity.host),")")," ","%20")
| sort `Forecasted High CPU` desc
| limit toLong($TopN)

150.title: Memory % Top $TopN Entities (Last 7 Days)
150.description: Memory current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns by host. Click the host link to drill into Infrastructure and Operations for a host. Click the filter link to filter the dashboard for a host. The table time range is fixed for the last 7 days.
150.query:
timeseries {
  memUsage = avg(dt.host.memory.usage), 
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }, by:{dt.entity.host}
},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
| fieldsAdd memUsage.Median = arrayAvg(memUsage)
| fieldsAdd memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(memUsage[] < memUsage.Median, memUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(memUsage[] > memUsage.Median, memUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd memUsage.PercentChange = 100 * (memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian - memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowTrafficMEM = memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(memUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgTrafficMEM = memUsage.Median*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(memUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficMEM = memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(memUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fields `Host Name` = concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.host),"](https://",$Tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Default#filtering=%22Host+name%22+%3D+",entityName(dt.entity.host),"+)"), `Observed MEM Low` = memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian, `Observed MEM Avg` = memUsage.Median, `Observed MEM High` = memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian, `Forecasted Low MEM` = ForecastedLowTrafficMEM, `Forecasted Avg MEM` = ForecastedAvgTrafficMEM, `Forecasted High MEM` = ForecastedHighTrafficMEM, `Provisioning` = (toDouble($ProvisionGoal) -ForecastedHighTrafficMEM), `Filter Dashboard` =  replaceString(concat("[FilterHost](https://",$Tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/",$DashboardID,"#from=now%28%29-",$DashboardTF,"h&to=now%28%29&tileIds=&vfilter_Host=",entityName(dt.entity.host),")")," ","%20")
| sort `Forecasted High MEM` desc
| limit toLong($TopN)

151.title: Disk Free % Top $TopN Entities (Last 7 Days)
151.description: Disk Free current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns by host. Click the host link to drill into Infrastructure and Operations for a host. Click the filter link to filter the dashboard for a host. The table time range is fixed for the last 7 days.
151.query:
timeseries {
  diskFree = avg(dt.host.disk.used.percent), 
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }, by:{dt.entity.host}
},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
| fieldsAdd diskFree.Median = arrayAvg(diskFree)
| fieldsAdd diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskFree[] < diskFree.Median, diskFree[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskFree[] > diskFree.Median, diskFree[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskFree.PercentChange = 100 * (diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian - diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowTrafficDiskFree = diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(diskFree.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgTrafficDiskFree = diskFree.Median*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(diskFree.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficDiskFree = diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(diskFree.PercentChange/toDouble(array($TrafficLoad)[3]))/100)
| fields `Host Name` = concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.host),"](https://",$Tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Default#filtering=%22Host+name%22+%3D+",entityName(dt.entity.host),"+)"), `Observed Disk Free Low` = diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian, `Observed Disk Free Avg` = diskFree.Median, `Observed Disk Free High` = diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian, `Forecasted Low Disk Free` = arrayMax(array(0, arrayMin(array(ForecastedLowTrafficDiskFree, 100)))), `Forecasted Avg Disk Free` = arrayMax(array(0, arrayMin(array(ForecastedAvgTrafficDiskFree, 100)))), `Forecasted High Disk Free` = arrayMax(array(0, arrayMin(array(ForecastedHighTrafficDiskFree, 100)))), `Provisioning` = (toDouble($ProvisionGoal) -ForecastedHighTrafficDiskFree), `Filter Dashboard` =  replaceString(concat("[FilterHost](https://",$Tenant,".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/",$DashboardID,"#from=now%28%29-",$DashboardTF,"h&to=now%28%29&tileIds=&vfilter_Host=",entityName(dt.entity.host),")")," ","%20")
| fieldsAdd `Disk Free Difference` = 100*(`Forecasted High Disk Free` - `Observed Disk Free High`)/`Observed Disk Free High`
| sort `Forecasted High Disk Free` desc
| limit toLong($TopN)
